elements.description: A glass jar filled with colorful coins and dollar bills, with a label reading '$20' prominently displayed. The jar sits on a white surface, surrounded by small stacks of coins and bills. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A close-up of a hand placing a $20 bill into a piggy bank with a cheerful expression. The piggy bank is bright pink with a coin slot on top. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
A stack of colorful $100 bills arranged neatly on a white surface, with a small calculator next to it displaying '$1,000'. The bills are crisp and new. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

A calendar with colorful stickers marking each week, symbolizing the passage of time. The calendar is open to a year view, with a small jar of coins and bills next to it. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
